cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Hello, Mr. Thakkar, sir. Congratulations on your new role. I hope you're doing well.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Haan, thank you. I'm a bit nervous, ji.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: That's completely normal, Milind. I'm here to guide you through our onboarding process. We're excited to have you on board.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Achha, that's great to hear. What documents do I need to bring on my first day?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: You'll need to bring your ID proof, address proof, and your offer letter. Don't worry, we've sent you a detailed email with all the requirements.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Thik hai, I've seen the email. What about the bank account details? Do I need to open a new account with Kotak Mahindra Bank?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Yes, we do have a tie-up with Kotak Mahindra Bank for our employees' salary accounts. But you can also use an existing account if it's with Kotak Mahindra Bank.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Okay, that makes sense. And what about the onboarding process itself? What can I expect on my first day?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: We'll be having a comprehensive orientation session, where you'll get to meet the team and understand your role better. It'll be a great opportunity to ask any questions you may have.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: That sounds good. I'm looking forward to it, sir.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Excellent, Milind. If you have any questions or concerns before your first day, please don't hesitate to reach out to me directly.

slow_thinking_rationale: At 63s: Conversation remains within policy guidelines. All requests are legitimate and follow proper procedures.

scenario_info.description: An HR representative calls a new hire a week before their joining date to provide information about the onboarding process and the documents they need to bring on their first day.
